EzGuild Migration Explorer

Where to land our 20-player squad. One slider drives every guild at once; every number below is intrinsic to that guild (it varies row to row). Pure HTML, no framework.

Decision-support, not the final call. Pick (= FIT × GET) is a model-guided shortlist for officer review, not a recommendation to join. FIT leans ~60% on the Gold-1 gap, whose baseline is a stale snapshot (the live champion is not re-fetched). Before deciding, manually verify each shortlisted guild’s current gold, activity, and whether they would actually accept 20 of us.
